zh.Sancerre: 法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易傑布格斯
zh.Sancerre, Bourges, Cher, Centre-Val de L: 法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易傑布格斯
zh.Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Kin: 法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易傑桑瑟
zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle於1221年出生在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易傑布格斯時，她的父親Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe41歲，母親Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois36歲。她於從1239年到1240年與Adam De Melun III在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易傑桑瑟結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她於1244年住在法國i萊-德-福朗斯默倫。她去世於1275年在法國瑟-吉馬內默倫享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle于1221年出生在法国崔-瓦爾 德 洛易傑布格斯时，她的父亲Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe41岁，母亲Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois36岁。她于从1239年到1240年与Adam De Melun III在法国崔-瓦爾 德 洛易傑桑瑟结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她于1244年住在法国i萊-德-福朗斯默倫。她去世于1275年在法国瑟-吉馬內默倫享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sancerre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Ovila, Pierre.

French: habitational name from a region in Picardy, located to the southeast of the Somme river, named with Latin sana terra ‘healthy, wholesome land’, and perhaps also from Le Santerre, the name of several places in the northern part of France.

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

en.lifeSummary: When Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle was born in 1221, in Bourges, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, France, her father, Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe, was 41 and her mother, Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois, was 36. She married Adam De Melun III from 1239 to 1240, in Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, France. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She lived in Melun, Île-de-France, France in 1244. She died in 1275, in Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle est née en 1221, à Bourges, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, France, son père, Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Adam De Melun III du 1239 au 1240, à Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, France. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle a vécu à Melun, Île-de-France, France en 1244. Elle est décédée en 1275, à Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle 1221 in Bourges, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe 41 und ihre Mutter Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois 36. Sie hat von 1239 bis 1240 in Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich Adam De Melun III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1244 hat sie in Melun, Île-de-France, Frankreich gelebt. Sie starb 1275 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesleが1221年にフランスセントレ-ヴァル ド ロイアーチャーボウルジェズで生まれた時，父Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupeは41歳，母Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandoisは36歳であった。から1239年まで1240年にフランスセントレ-ヴァル ド ロイアーチャーサンセアでAdam De Melun IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1244年にはフランスiレ-デ-フランスメルンに住んでいた。彼女は1275年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンメルンで54歳で死去した。

ko.Sancerre: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 처 부르그스

ko.lifeSummary: Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle(이)가 1221년 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 처 부르그스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1239년 부터 1240년 까지 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 처 산서르에서 Adam De Melun III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1244년도에 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 멜루에서 살았다. 그녀는 1275년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 멜루에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle nasceu em 1221, em Bourges, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, França, seu pai, Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Adam De Melun III de 1239 a 1240, em Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela viveu em Melun, Île-de-France, França em 1244. Ela faleceu em 1275, em Melun, Seine-et-Marne, França, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle родилась в 1221 г. в местности бургесь, чир, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adam De Melun III с 1239 по 1240 в местности сансирр, чир, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она жила в местности мелун, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в 1244 году. Она умерла в 1275 г. в местности мелун, сине-ет-марн, Франция в возрасте 54 лет.

Se casó con Adam De Melun III desde 1239 hasta 1240, en Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Melun, Île-de-France, Francia en 1244. Murió en 1275, en Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, a la edad de 54 años.
